messages.name: Marisol Vega
messages.message: So glad I found this little corner of the internet. It feels like a kitchen with the lights on. Thank you for having me.

messages.name: Dev Okafor
messages.message: Stopping by from the other side of the world. Sending warmth to whoever reads this next. 🌍

messages.name: Pilar
messages.message: First time signing a guestbook since I was a kid at my grandmother's lake house. Lovely to do it again.

messages.name: The Whitman House
messages.message: We read these out loud at dinner. Keep them coming — they make the table a little brighter.

messages.name: Quinn Adeyemi
messages.message: Just passing through. Lovely place. I'll be back.

messages.name: Sam
messages.message: Hello from a rainy Tuesday. This made it a little less grey.
